name: pilot-rag
description: Local, self-hosted RAG scaffold for full-stack Microsoft codebases. /fsp-rag-init builds a provider-agnostic Q&A system in ./pilot-rag/ within your project: Microsoft.Extensions.AI (IChatClient/IEmbeddingGenerator) with an architecture test proving zero vendor refs in the core, Roslyn/regex/Markdown/OpenAPI/config chunkers with idempotent Qdrant ingestion, an SSE /ask endpoint with a cosine score floor and source citation, an Angular Signals chat UI, and a retrieval hit-rate eval gate. Swap Ollama<->Azure OpenAI by appsettings only. .NET-only orchestration, no Python/LangChain/Semantic Kernel.
